content: understanding-gate Phase 2 ships PreToolUse hook (claude-code) + tool.execute.before (opencode) + approve/revoke/status CLI. Source of truth: persisted report's approvalStatus field. Bumps to 0.2.0 (PR #51). End-to-end smoke against tmpdir confirms pending->approve->revoke transitions, deny-envelope shape on the binary, and JSONL audit-log entries for block/approve/revoke/force_bypass.

Read-only tools (Read/Grep/Glob/LS/Task/TodoWrite/...) bypass enforcement at all times — verified by parametric tests in enforcement.test.ts and corroborated by decideEnforcement short-circuit (writeToolNames.has(tool) gate fires before any approval/force check). Architecturally matches docs/architecture.md §4.6.

UNDERSTANDING_GATE_FORCE bypass requires UNDERSTANDING_GATE_FORCE_REASON of >= 10 chars; missing/short reason still blocks (mode=force_invalid). Both the bypass and the 'invalid' block path land in audit.log so post-incident review reconstructs intent.
